ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Permission.C_PERM_8020_Bypass_Opp_V_RULE) , DateValue(CreatedDate) >= $Setup.CSET_9900__c.OppCutoverDate__c , Contains(fxRecordTypeName__c,'Sales') /*Default and Dealer, not INF*/ , TEXT(StageName)='Closed Won' , OR( LEN( Reason_Lost_Detail__c) < 1 , NOT(ISBLANK(fxMissingFields_CW__c)) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_071: Please fill the Closed Reason Detail and the fields mentioned in Fields to Complete section
